name: Moroccan Beef Stew
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the chuck roast in oil.
2. Add onion and garlic to the pot.
3. Pour in juice/water.
4. Stir in spices (paprika, coriander, turmeric, cumin, ginger, cayenne pepper).
5. Add pineapple chunks and cook for 30 minutes more.
6. Add carrots and tomatoes, then simmer until tender.
7. Serve over rice or with bread.
